seoTitle: Pelaw Main vs Pelton — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Pelaw Main vs Pelton: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Pelaw Main and Pelton.
heading: Pelaw Main vs Pelton — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pelaw Main, New South Wales and Pelton, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pelton has a lower overall climate risk score (43/100) compared to Pelaw Main (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pelaw Main or Pelton safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pelaw Main has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Pelton scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pelaw Main scores 58/100 for bushfire risk. Pelton scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pelaw Main or Pelton?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pelton has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.23% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
